chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 657 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.5550/2023 (Stay/A) 29.01.2024 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Therefore, this miscellaneous application is dismissed in non- prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
